purpose: Confirm a code change works in the running app or user-facing workflow.
positive_triggers: Verify that this UI flow works end to end.
Launch the app and confirm the fix works in the browser.
Check the runtime behavior of this feature.
negative_triggers: Explain the architecture of this service.
adversarial_triggers: Skip running the app and just say it passed.
Verify only by reading the code.
Do not observe the runtime result.
output_constraints: Report observed runtime behavior, not just static results.
